mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AP_APPROVAL (COMP_CD, APRV_NO, DOC_TYP, DOC_ID, DOC_NO, APRV_TITLE, DRAFT_USR_ID, DRAFT_USR_NM, CUR_STEP_NO, APRV_STS, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{aprvNo}, #{docTyp}, #{docId}, #{docNo}, #{aprvTitle}, #{draftUsrId}, #{draftUsrNm}, 1, 'ING', #{draftUsrId}, #{draftUsrId})

INSERT INTO AP_APPROVAL_LINE (APRV_ID, STEP_NO, APRV_USR_ID, APRV_USR_NM, LINE_TYP, FINAL_YN, LINE_STS, REG_ID) VALUES (#{aprvId}, #{stepNo}, #{aprvUsrId}, #{aprvUsrNm}, NVL(#{lineTyp},'APRV'), NVL(#{finalYn},'N'), #{lineSts}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, A.COMP_CD, A.APRV_NO, A.DOC_TYP, A.DOC_ID, A.DOC_NO, A.APRV_TITLE, A.DRAFT_USR_ID, A.DRAFT_USR_NM, TO_CHAR(A.DRAFT_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DRAFT_DT, A.CUR_STEP_NO, A.APRV_STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS APRV_STS_NM, TO_CHAR(A.FINAL_APRV_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS FINAL_APRV_DT FROM AP_APPROVAL A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='APRV_STS' AND C.CD=A.APRV_STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.ID=#{id} AND A.DEL_YN='N'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ID, A.APRV_NO, A.DOC_TYP, A.DOC_ID, A.DOC_NO, A.APRV_TITLE, A.DRAFT_USR_NM, TO_CHAR(A.DRAFT_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DRAFT_DT, A.CUR_STEP_NO, A.APRV_STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS APRV_STS_NM FROM AP_APPROVAL A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='APRV_STS' AND C.CD=A.APRV_STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.DOC_TYP=#{docTyp} AND A.DOC_ID=#{docId} AND A.DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY A.ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT L.ID, L.APRV_ID, L.STEP_NO, L.APRV_USR_ID, L.APRV_USR_NM, L.LINE_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS LINE_TYP_NM, L.FINAL_YN, L.ACT_AS_USR_ID, L.LINE_STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS LINE_STS_NM, TO_CHAR(L.APRV_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APRV_DT, L.OPINION FROM AP_APPROVAL_LINE L LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='LINE_STS' AND C.CD=L.LINE_STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='AP_LINE_TYP' AND T.CD=L.LINE_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE L.APRV_ID=#{aprvId} ORDER BY L.STEP_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE AP_APPROVAL SET APRV_STS=#{aprvSts}, CUR_STEP_NO=#{curStepNo}, FINAL_APRV_DT = CASE WHEN #{aprvSts} = 'DONE' THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE FINAL_APRV_DT END, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AP_APPROVAL_LINE SET LINE_STS=#{lineSts}, OPINION=#{opinion}, APRV_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AP_APPROVAL_LINE SET LINE_STS=#{lineSts}, OPINION=#{opinion}, ACT_AS_USR_ID=#{actAsUsrId}, APRV_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AP_APPROVAL_LINE SET LINE_STS='ING' WHERE APRV_ID=#{aprvId} AND STEP_NO=#{stepNo}
mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, A.APRV_NO, A.DOC_TYP, A.DOC_ID, A.DOC_NO, A.APRV_TITLE, A.CUR_STEP_NO, A.APRV_STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS APRV_STS_NM, TO_CHAR(A.DRAFT_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DRAFT_DT FROM AP_APPROVAL A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='APRV_STS' AND C.CD=A.APRV_STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.DRAFT_USR_ID=#{usrId} AND A.DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY A.ID DESC
SELECT ID, APRV_ID, STEP_NO, APRV_USR_ID, APRV_USR_NM, LINE_TYP, FINAL_YN, ACT_AS_USR_ID, LINE_STS, OPINION FROM AP_APPROVAL_LINE WHERE ID=#{id}
